positive: A stylized minimalist illustration featuring a cheerful, abstract celestial body cluster: a crescent moon, two small stylized stars, and a flowing nebular ribbon. The design should be centered and highly graphic, using clean, thick linework and contrasting solid color blocks. The primary palette is deep indigo, soft turquoise, and brilliant gold accents. Composition must be suitable for screen printing on apparel. Style: Flat design, highly aesthetic, vector art aesthetic, clean silhouette, high contrast. Background should be solid or negative space.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, grainy, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, illegible, messy, photorealistic, 3d render
